hotelImages.caption: Baiturrahman Grand Mosque - 840 m from property

address.address2: Lorong Ktr. Lurah, Lampaseh Kota, Kec. Kuta Raja, Kota Banda Aceh, Aceh

nearbyPlaces.name: Rumah Sakit Gigi dan Mulut Unsyiah

description.short: Get your trip off to a great start with a stay at this property, which offers free Wi-Fi in all rooms. Conveniently situated in the Banda Aceh part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. Don't leave before paying a visit to the famous Sultan Iskandar Muda International Airport.  This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

details.title: Infant 0-3 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding. Note, if you need a cot, it may incur an extra charge and is subject to availability.

details.title: Children 4-10 year(s)
details.description: Stay for free if using existing bedding.

adult: Guests 11 years and older are considered adults.
extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Strategic place near mosque and also walking distance from shops and restaurants not so far. Room was not cleaned properly. Can repeat again but need to ask the staff for hospitality first before using the room.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewPositives: Eingenlijk wil ik geen ster geven, we kregen geen kamer gehad ondanks we hebben kamer online geboekt,maar ze hebben hun kamer verkocht aan andere, ze vroegen ons om upgrade kamer te doen met extra te betalen,na de hele discussie  uiteindelijk ze gingen ons gestuurd naar een van andere hotel in het centrum   (Wisma Nabila)maar echte prijs warren goedkoper dan hadden we online geboekt,zo vervelend 😣 kamer warren niet proper,badkamer is vies en klein. Ondanks rookvrije kamer zo geschreven maar in de gang van van onze kamer stonken naar sigaretten.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Pada saat datang Kondisi kamar belum siap, Televisi belum terpasang, Listrik harus di hubungi ke penjaga karna kontak listrik di bawah semua.

pada saat mati lampu genset tidak ready langsung sehingga air tidak ada dan liatrik mati, petugas kurang sigap. 
parkiran kurang luas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewNegatives:
- tidak bersih
- ketika check in harus bayar2 lagi, padahal sudah lunas pembayaran lewat aplikasi
- suasana hotel seperti GUDANG
- harga tidak sepadan dengan fasilitas

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
Booked Family Room, which in picture room have 2 bed, but in description only state 1 king bed. (Honestly i never found family room with only 1 bed). So the picture and description is misleading. 

Second is, at last minute, which is a few day before the actual date , i was told the hotel request to changed my booking to other hotel, which if i refuse they will refund money. The problem is, the stay date  is during major event, and other hotel room is fully booked, and i cant found other hotel with the same standard, causing a big difficulty to me. thus i accept the change even though the new hotel standard is bit lower than the original hotel that ive booked.
comments.reviewTitle: Misleading description, changed to other hotel (with lower standard)

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Message from the application, there is an additional charge of 30,000 per night at the hotel. When I entered the room, it hadn't been cleaned yet, because the staff was lounging around. In the end, I as a guest helped the staff clean the room myself so I could rest a bit faster.
comments.originalComment:
Pesan dr aplikasi, dihotel dikenakan biaya lg 30rb / mlm.
Pas masuk kamarny blm d bersihin, krn staff ny leyeh leyeh trakhir saya sbg pengunjung membantu staff membersihkan kamar sendiri agak bisa cepat istirahat.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: First impression was shocking, the floor was dirty, the sheets were dirty, the trash bin had not been emptied. The pillows were messy.
comments.originalComment: Pertama datang shock banget, lantai kotor, sprei kotor, tong sampah isinya blm di buang. Bantal tidak rapi

comments.reviewComments: Upon checking in, the room was not ready and the condition of the area was dirty, the bathroom was leaking, and water was coming out from the ceiling. The staff was unprofessional.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Sikar gigi payah di minta

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: They ask me to pay tax, eventho it’s already charged during my booking at Agoda. They also confirmed that they don’t use Agoda anymore to get reservations. The building is also unfinished.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: After i check out from the hotel, i dont get my deposit back . Too many excuse , after 5 days from check out . still dont get my deposit money back .

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The TV is missing. The table is messy. There is no water heater. There is no closet. The electricity has been out for a long time. It doesn't look like the photos. Very bad, not recommended.

tv nggak ada. meja reok . pemanas air ngga ada. lemari ngga ada. 
listrik mati lama
ngga seperti difoto .
sangat jelek tidak recomended

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is not cleaned, trash is scattered in the room and on the balcony, the air conditioning is not cold, and the service is poor.
comments.originalComment: Kamar tidak di bersihkan sampah berserakan di kamar dan di balkon, ac tidak dingin pelayanan buruk

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?

Bangunan belom siap angker
Pas cek in ada biaya tampahan
Pelayan benar2 buruk 
Engak lagi2 nginap di sini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Good, clean, and tidy.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The place is comfortable, but the service is a bit slow, and it is not very clean.
comments.originalComment: Deket dr mana mana, nyaman, tp agak lambat pelayanannya, dan kurang bersih

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Costs must be increased; this model is not suitable for the current era.
comments.originalComment: Harus tambah biaya, tidak cocok untuk era sekarang yang model begini

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
1. Price: upon arrival at the hotel, an additional 60,000 IDR is required even though it has already been fully paid through the application.  
2. Facilities: no wifi, the TV is on but there is no broadcast; if you want to watch TV, you have to hotspot from your own phone.
comments.originalComment:
1. harga : sampai hotel bayar lagi 60rb pdhl sudah lunas di bayar melalui aplikasi
2. fasiltas : wifi tidak ada, TV nyala tp tidak ada siaran, klu mau nonton tv harus hotspot dr HP sendiri.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
AC gak dingin
Kamar kurang bersih
Koordinasi kacau. Saya pesan kamar 'x 'di agoda, sampai lokasi kata recepcionist udah penuh, kalau mau nambah sekian rupiah utk kamar 'y'. Kalo ga mau ya batalkan sama pihak agoda katanya.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The room is dirty, the bed is dusty, and there are spider webs in the room.
comments.originalComment: room nya kotor, tempat tidur berdebu,  kamar bersarang laba laba

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Suka.  Tempatnya bagus.. baru property nya.. tapi gak ada lantai 1, dan wifi lagi gak bisa pada saat itu

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Everything is okay, the room looks new, but it lacks a clothes hanger and wifi, the TV cannot be used.
comments.originalComment: Semuanya Oke, ruangan terlihat baru yg kurang hanya tdk tersedia gantungan baju dan wifi, tv tdk bisa dipakai

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The receptionist knows very little. When I had already booked, they didn't know how to check on their computer. Even for a simple bottle of water, the staff had to ask their boss. Additionally, there was a lot of sand and hair in the room as if it hadn't been cleaned. The blanket wasn't clean either; it had lipstick stains.
comments.originalComment:
Resepsionis nya banyak tidak tahu.
Masa saya sudah booking buat cek di komputer mereka pun tidak tahu.  Setingkat air minum aja staff nya tanyak ke bos nya . Terus dalam kamar juga banyak pasir dan rambut kayak tidak dibersihkan. Selimut nya juga gak bersih ada bekas lipstik

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The new hotel is not fully completed yet, the staff provides good assistance, there is some dust, noise from outside, and no amenities.
comments.reviewTitle: The new hotel is still under construction.
comments.originalTitle: โรงแรมใหม่ยังสร้างไม่เสร็จ
comments.originalComment: โรงแรมใหม่ยังสร้างไม่เสร็จพนักงานให้การช่วยเหลือดีมีฝุ่นบ้างเสียงรบกวนจากด้านนอกไม่มีสิ่งอำนวยความสะดวก

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Pretty good location, in a nice neighbourhood close to a big street filled with food carts. Close enough to attractions such as mosque and tsunami museum. Room was adequate, fine for a night.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The air is weak, the bathroom is dirty. There are many stains on the bed. The toilet is also dirty and hasn't been scrubbed, the sink hasn't been cleaned either.
comments.originalComment:
Air lemah, kamar lmyn kotor. Lmyn byk noda di tempat tidur
Wc jg kotor tidak disikat, wastafel jg tidak dibersihkan

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: During our holiday in Banda Aceh, Urbanview Hotel Ranls Dream became one of the memorable experiences of our trip. The hotel is still new, the toilet is clean and comfortable, the bed is cozy, with a very cheap price. We were very satisfied with the facilities provided 🥰
comments.originalComment: Selama berlibur di Banda Aceh, Urbanview Hotel Ranls Dream menjadi salah 1 kenangan berkesan dalam perjalanan kami. Hotelnya masih baru, toilet bersih nyaman, tempat tidur nyaman, dengan harga yg sangat murah begitu puas dengan fasilitas yg didapatkan 🥰

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
abbiamo scelto questo hotel su agoda per via del prezzo e per la posizione, non sicuramente per il resto perché gia la presentazione fotografica fatta a computer ci diceva tutto. hotel non terminato, cavi elettrici che svolazzano e pure un vano per ascensore utilizzato come pattumiera. lhotel è un cantiere mai terminato ma fin qui può andare bene. al nostro arrivo ci viene gentilmente detto dal personale che nulla ha a che fare con tutto ciò, che per gli "stranieri" c è da pagare una tassa di 120.000 rupie (cosa che cambia di non poco il.prezzo totale della stanza) e che è la "legge" di aceh. ho passato precedentemente 2 settimane spettacolari ad aceh e non ho mai avuto questo tipo di problema anzi mi sentivo a casa ovunque andavo non uno "straniero". quindi faccio notare al gentile receptionist che questa è una menzogna e che non ho intenzione di pagare. successivamente dopo una telefonata col suo capo mi viene comunicato che magicamente la tassa è scesa a 60.000 rupie e che se non accettavo ero libero di cambiare hotel (grazie molto gentile, non sapevo di avere questo diritto essendo straniero). sfortunamente per l'orario in cui sono arrivato in città e per, ahimè, aver pagato online tramite agoda sobo dovuto restare e accettare questo vergognoso ricatto.
agoda dovrebbe come minimo cancellare la collaborazione con queste persone.

aceh non merita un posto cosi

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: At arrival they told me I had to pay an extra fee of 100k as a foreigner… the girl behind the desk didn’t look like an adult and communication was poor. I left this place and booked something else instead

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments:
1.체크인때 외국인은 100,000루피를 더 내야한다고 강제로 요구여 늦은시간이고 해서 어쩔수없이 지불하고 투숙하였다. 
2.객실에 창문이 없다.
